title: Helixanthera subalata
taxonomy: Helixanthera subalata is a species of flowering plant in the family Loranthaceae. It belongs to the order Santalales and the clade Angiosperms. The class is Magnoliopsida and the subclass is Asteridae. The family Loranthaceae is a group of mistletoe plants. Helixanthera subalata is native to the tropical regions of Asia.
uses: Helixanthera subalata is reported to have various traditional medicinal uses in Southeast Asia. It is believed to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential therapeutic applications.
